use_codes.desc: REDUCING ELEVATED INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE IN PATIENTS WITH OPEN-ANGLE GLAUCOMA OR OCULAR HYPERTENSION

indications.text:
XELPROS (latanoprost ophthalmic emulsion) 0.005% is indicated for the reduction of elevated intraocular pressure (IOP)
in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.

XELPROS® (latanoprost ophthalmic emulsion) 0.005% is indicated for the reduction of elevated intraocular pressure
(IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.

XELPROS® (latanoprost ophthalmic emulsion) 0.005% is indicated for the reduction of elevated
intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.
